name: TikTok
description: TikTok Content Posting API v2 — post videos & photos, manage content, get user info, video analytics, and creator settings via OAuth2

tools.name: post_video

title.description: Video caption text (max 2200 chars) — this is the ONLY text field. Include hashtags and @mentions here.

video_cover_timestamp_ms.description: Timestamp in ms for auto-generated cover image

brand_organic_toggle.description: Whether this is organic branded content

video_url.description: Publicly accessible video URL (required for PULL_FROM_URL)

video_size.description: Total video file size in bytes (required for FILE_UPLOAD)

chunk_size.description: Size of each chunk in bytes (required for FILE_UPLOAD)

total_chunk_count.description: Total number of chunks (required for FILE_UPLOAD)

tools.name: post_photo

auto_add_music.description: Auto add music to photo post

brand_organic_toggle.description: Whether this is organic branded content

photo_images.description: Array of publicly accessible image URLs (max 35)

photo_cover_index.description: Index of photo to use as cover (0-based)

tools.name: upload_to_inbox

video_size.description: Total video file size in bytes (required for FILE_UPLOAD)

chunk_size.description: Size of each chunk in bytes (required for FILE_UPLOAD)

total_chunk_count.description: Total number of chunks (required for FILE_UPLOAD)

tools.name: get_publish_status
tools.description: Check the status of a TikTok content post or upload. Returns current status (PROCESSING_UPLOAD, PROCESSING_DOWNLOAD, SEND_TO_USER_INBOX, PUBLISH_COMPLETE, FAILED), fail reason if applicable, and the published item ID when complete.

publish_id.description: Publish ID returned from post-video, post-photo, or upload-to-inbox

tools.name: query_creator_info
tools.description: Query the authenticated TikTok creator's information before posting content. Returns creator settings including available privacy levels, whether comments/duet/stitch are allowed, and maximum video duration. Call this before posting to know what options are available.

tools.name: get_user_info
tools.description:
Get the authenticated TikTok user's profile information including display name, avatar, bio, follower/following/likes counts, and video count.

Available fields: open_id, union_id, avatar_url, avatar_url_100, avatar_large_url, display_name, bio_description, profile_deep_link, is_verified, username, follower_count, following_count, likes_count, video_count

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to retrieve (e.g. 'open_id,display_name,avatar_url,follower_count,video_count')

tools.name: list_videos
tools.description:
List the authenticated user's public TikTok videos, sorted by create_time descending. Returns video metadata including views, likes, comments, and share counts.

Available fields: id, title, create_time, cover_image_url, share_url, duration, like_count, comment_count, share_count, view_count, video_description, height, width, embed_html, embed_link

fields.description: Comma-separated list of video fields to return

tools.name: query_videos

fields.description: Comma-separated list of video fields to return

tools.name: list_comments
tools.description:
Get a paginated list of comments on a TikTok video. Returns comment text, like count, reply count, and creation time. Supports sorting by create_time_desc or like_count_desc.

Requires scope: comment.list or comment.list.manage

Example:
{
  "video_id": "7123456789",
  "max_count": 20,
  "sort_order": "create_time_desc"
}

video_id.description: TikTok video ID to get comments for

tools.name: list_comment_replies
tools.description:
Get a paginated list of replies to a specific comment on a TikTok video. Returns reply text, like count, and creation time.

Requires scope: comment.list or comment.list.manage

Example:
{
  "video_id": "7123456789",
  "comment_id": "7234567890",
  "max_count": 20
}

video_id.description: TikTok video ID the comment belongs to

comment_id.description: Parent comment ID to get replies for
